digitally-sign-first-page-pdf.title: Digitally Sign First Page of PDF
digitally-sign-first-page-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, configure a certificate, and add a visible digital signature to page one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-second-digital-signature-page-3.title: Add Second Digital Signature on Page 3 of PDF
add-second-digital-signature-page-3.description: Demonstrates how to apply two digital signatures to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, with the second signature placed on page three in a custom rectangle.

custom-signature-appearance-with-image.title: Configure Custom Signature Appearance with Image and Background Color
custom-signature-appearance-with-image.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate while customizing the visible signature appearance with a foreground image and a background color.

suppress-reason-location-when-signing-pd.title: Suppress Reason and Location When Signing PDF
suppress-reason-location-when-signing-pd.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while suppressing the Reason and Location fields by assigning empty strings before signing.

sign-pdf-french-caption.title: Sign PDF with French Digital Signature Caption
sign-pdf-french-caption.description: Shows how to digitally sign a PDF and change the signature appearance labels to French by configuring the SignatureCustomAppearance locale settings.

remove-named-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove a Named Signature from a PDF
remove-named-signature-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, remove a specific signature by its name using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the updated file.

verify-contractsigner-signature.title: Verify Presence and Validity of 'ContractSigner' Signature in PDF
verify-contractsigner-signature.description: Demonstrates how to check a PDF for a specific digital signature named 'ContractSigner' and verify its validity using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

validate-pdf-signature.title: Validate PDF Signature Using PdfFileSignature
validate-pdf-signature.description: Shows how to verify the cryptographic integrity of the 'ManagerSignature' digital signature field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

extract-signing-certificate-from-pdf.title: Extract Signing Certificate from PDF Signature Field
extract-signing-certificate-from-pdf.description: Shows how to retrieve the signing certificate from a named signature field in a PDF document and save it as a .cer file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-signature-image-to-png.title: Extract Signature Image from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-signature-image-to-png.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, extract the image of a signature field named 'WitnessSignature', and write it to a PNG file using Aspose.Pdf.

custom-pdf-signature-appearance.title: Create Custom PDF Signature Appearance Without Default Caption
custom-pdf-signature-appearance.description: Shows how to sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and hide the default "Digitally signed by" label by configuring a custom signature appearance.

sign-pdf-with-pfx-certificate.title: Sign PDF with PFX Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-pfx-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF file using a password‑protected PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-specific-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Signature from PDF with Error Handling
remove-specific-signature-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates locating a named digital signature in a PDF, removing it while keeping the field, and handling the case where the signature is missing.

verify-pdf-signatures-to-json.title: Verify PDF Signatures and Export Results to JSON
verify-pdf-signatures-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, enumerate its digital signatures, verify each signature, and write the verification outcomes to a formatted JSON file.

sign-pdf-and-verify-signature.title: Sign PDF and Verify Signature using PdfFileSignature
sign-pdf-and-verify-signature.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF with a PKCS#12 certificate using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature and then verify the signature's authenticity.

digitally-sign-pdf-with-reason-location.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Reason and Location
digitally-sign-pdf-with-reason-location.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to digitally sign a PDF, specifying the signature reason as 'Approved for release' and the location as 'New York'.

add-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Signature Field and Sign PDF with Aspose.Pdf
add-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a signature field on a specific page using FormEditor, and digitally signing the document with a PKCS#7 certificate.

extract-certificate-details-from-pdf-sig.title: Extract Certificate Details from PDF Signature
extract-certificate-details-from-pdf-sig.description: Demonstrates how to open a signed PDF, enumerate its signature fields, and retrieve the X.509 certificate information such as issuer and expiration date using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-pdf-signature-report.title: Generate PDF Signature Report
generate-pdf-signature-report.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts each signature's details and verification status using PdfFileSignature, and creates a new PDF that summarizes all signatures in a report.

sign-pdf-with-retry.title: Sign PDF with Retry on File Lock
sign-pdf-with-retry.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with a retry mechanism that handles file‑lock IOExceptions.

remove-all-signatures-from-pdf.title: Remove All Signatures from a PDF
remove-all-signatures-from-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to delete every digital signature from a PDF file and save the cleaned version.

verify-multiple-pdf-signatures.title: Verify Multiple PDF Signatures and Retrieve Details
verify-multiple-pdf-signatures.description: Shows how to bind a signed PDF, enumerate all signature names, verify each signature, and extract signer, reason, location, and date information using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-signature-images-html-report.title: Extract Signature Images to HTML Report
extract-signature-images-html-report.description: Demonstrates how to extract visual signature images from a signed PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature and generate an HTML report that embeds the images as Base64 data URIs.

semi-transparent-signature-background.title: Apply Semi-Transparent Background to PDF Signature
semi-transparent-signature-background.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while configuring a semi‑transparent background color for the signature's visual appearance.

list-signature-names-in-pdf.title: List Signature Names in PDF
list-signature-names-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, retrieve all active signature names, and display them. Includes basic error handling for missing files and invalid input.

sign-pdf-with-visible-image.title: Sign PDF with Visible Image Using PdfFileSignature
sign-pdf-with-visible-image.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible signature image to a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade in a console application.

sign-pdf-visible-signature-last-page.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature on Last Page
sign-pdf-visible-signature-last-page.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, placing a visible signature image at the bottom‑right corner of the last page.

locale-specific-pdf-digital-signature.title: Locale-Specific PDF Digital Signature with Custom Appearance
locale-specific-pdf-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with a PKCS#7 digital signature and a custom appearance that uses locale-specific labels for German, Spanish, and Japanese.

remove-existing-signatures-and-resign-pd.title: Remove Existing Signatures and Re‑sign PDF
remove-existing-signatures-and-resign-pd.description: Demonstrates how to delete all signatures from a PDF and then apply a new digital signature using an updated certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

verify-no-signatures-in-pdf.title: Verify No Signatures in PDF
verify-no-signatures-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, checking if it contains any signatures, and attempting to verify a non‑existent signature, which should return false.

remove-all-signatures-from-pdfs.title: Remove All Signatures from PDFs
remove-all-signatures-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to recursively scan a directory for PDF files, open each with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature, remove all digital signatures, and save a new copy without signatures.

extract-certificate-serial-number.title: Extract and Log Certificate Serial Number from PDF Signatures
extract-certificate-serial-number.description: Shows how to open a signed PDF, enumerate its signatures, extract the associated X509 certificate, and log the certificate's serial number for audit purposes.

list-signature-reasons-and-locations.title: List Signature Reasons and Locations in a PDF
list-signature-reasons-and-locations.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, retrieve all signature names, and output each signature's reason and location metadata.

create-invisible-pdf-digital-signature.title: Create an Invisible Digital Signature in PDF
create-invisible-pdf-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf using a hidden appearance, preserving cryptographic validity without any visual signature.

extract-signing-certificate-subject-dn.title: Extract Signing Certificate Subject DN from PDF
extract-signing-certificate-subject-dn.description: Demonstrates how to open a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the signing certificate of the first signature, retrieve its subject distinguished name, and store it in a DataTable.
